title="ORDER TRACKING"]Track the status of your order: Woodmart marketplace provides the ability to track the status of an order by tracking number.[/woodmart_accordion_item][woodmart_accordion_item title="HOW TO SHOP ONLINE?"]If the contents of the parcel are suspicious to customs officers (for example, many identical goods), it may be further checked.[/woodmart_accordion_item][woodmart_accordion_item title="WHAT HAPPENS AFTER BEING CONFIRMED?"]If all other options fail, you may need to consider taking legal action. This can be a lengthy and costly process, so it’s important to weigh the potential benefits against the risks and costs.[/woodmart_accordion_item][woodmart_accordion_item title="INCONSISTENT ORDER"]Keep the product in its original packaging along with all documents confirming the purchase and refund. You will need this for further communication with the seller and the payment system.[/woodmart_accordion_item][woodmart_accordion_item title="I RECEIVED MY ORDER AFTER GETTING A REFUND. WHAT CAN I DO?"]Keep the product in its original packaging along with all documents confirming the purchase and refund. You will need this for further communication with the seller and the payment system.[/woodmart_accordion_item][woodmart_accordion_item title="WHAT IF THE PACKAGE IS HELD BY CUSTOMS?"]Keep the product in its original packaging along with all documents confirming the purchase and refund. You will need this for further communication with the seller and the payment system.[/woodmart_accordion_item][woodmart_accordion_item title="WHEN WILL I RECEIVE MY ORDER?"]Keep the product in its original packaging along with all documents confirming the purchase and refund.
